archetype: Archetype 2: The Performance Pro (Elite Athleticism & Precision)
core_philosophy: Tactical Minimalism. High energy, command-center feel. Replace soft shadows with 1px solid strokes or inner glow highlights.

headings.usage: Use for large titles, massive impact metrics, swipe card names. MUST use tracking-tight.

body.usage: Use for all body text, lists, and chat bubbles.

spacing_and_layout.layout_strategy: Mobile-native, thumb-friendly. 44pt minimum touch targets. Use safe-area insets. Bottom tab navigation is fixed.

buttons.primary: Background: Volt Blue (#007AFF). Text: Pure White. Shape: rounded-medium (8px). 1px stroke of #FFFFFF/20 on top edge for tactile feel. Haptic feedback on press.
buttons.secondary: Background: #141414. Border: 1px solid #27272A. Text: Pure White.

swipeable_cards.container: Full viewport height minus tabs. border-radius: 16px. Overflows hidden.
swipeable_cards.overlay: Linear gradient overlay from bottom (rgba(10,10,10,1) 0%, rgba(10,10,10,0) 50%) to ensure text readability.
swipeable_cards.content: Position absolute at bottom. Name in H1 Bebas Neue. Skills/Distance in tags (pill shape).
swipeable_cards.interactions: PanResponder or react-native-reanimated for smooth swipe. Haptic feedback on right swipe.

match_list_item.indicator: Left-accent border. 4px width, Volt Blue for Gaming, Electric Blaze for Sports.
match_list_item.content: Sport icon, Title, Location, DateTime, Participants count.

bottom_tab_bar.style: Solid #141414 with top border #27272A. Safe area bottom inset added.

chat_bubbles.user: Background Volt Blue (#007AFF), border-radius 16px, bottom-right radius 4px.

image_urls.description: Abstract dark tactical texture with volt blue and electric blaze energy trails for login/auth screen background.
Man in blue hoodie with gaming headphones for gamer profile swipe card.
Dramatic silhouette of a basketball player for sports player profile swipe card.
Person on basketball court for sports match placeholder.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use lucide-react-native for all icons. Avoid emojis. Match stroke width to 2 for crispness.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use expo-haptics for 'impactAsync(ImpactFeedbackStyle.Light)' when swiping right or pressing primary 'Join' buttons.
For Swipeable Cards, you can build a custom reanimated stack or use a library like react-native-deck-swiper, ensuring haptic feedback onRightSwipe.
ALL interactive elements and key text elements MUST have a data-testid (or testID in RN) attribute (e.g., testID='login-button', testID='match-item-title').
Images MUST NOT be rendered directly over text. Use LinearGradient from expo-linear-gradient for text readability on swipe cards.
For typography, install @expo-google-fonts/bebas-neue and @expo-google-fonts/dm-sans, or fallback to system sans-serif with strong styling if font loading is delayed.
Authentication UI: Use the onboarding_background as full screen ImageBackground, add a heavy dark overlay, and place the sign-in forms on top.
Dual-Mode Discovery: Implement a stylish segmented control (custom built with Animated) at the top header to toggle between Matches (List) and Players (Swipe).
